g.onclick: sendPrompt('Design the Equipment Failure agent — what RAG sources does it query, what claim structure does it output?')
sendPrompt('Design the Human Factors agent — how does it analyze witness statements and operational procedures?')
sendPrompt('Design the Environmental Conditions agent — what geological and atmospheric data does it process?')
sendPrompt('Design the Regulatory Compliance agent — how does it check against Rostechnadzor standards and safety regulations?')

svg.text: Each agent outputs: {claim, evidence, confidence, warrant}

g.text: Claim set C = {c1, c2, ..., cn} with evidence and confidence scores

svg.text: v5: Reasoning verification — Dung's argumentation framework

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does conflict detection work? How do we identify rebutting vs undercutting attacks between agent claims?')
sendPrompt('How is the abstract argumentation framework AF = (Args, Attacks) constructed from the detected conflicts?')
sendPrompt('How do grounded and preferred semantics compute which arguments survive? Walk through the algorithm on the Kostenko data.')
sendPrompt('How does the report generation module produce the final investigation report with full argumentation graph traces?')
sendPrompt('What does the argumentation trace look like in the final report? Show an example output structure.')
sendPrompt('What role does the human investigator play in the final review loop?')
